10# Adrian Sterling
11
12[+1 555-123-4567](tel:+15551234567) | <adrian.sterling@email.com> | [in/adriansterling](https://linkedin.com/in/adriansterling) | [adriansterling](https://github.com/adriansterling)
13
14## Education
15
16### Stanford University || Sept 2018 - June 2021
17
18**_Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, Summa Cum Laude_** || San Francisco, CA
19
20- Cumulative GPA: 3.82 | Dean's List (2019-2022) | Computer Science Excellence Award
21- Advanced coursework: Distributed Systems, Advanced Algorithms, Compiler Design, Applied Cryptography
22- President, Computer Science Student Association (2021-2025) — Led 200+ members, organized FAANG speaker series
23
24## Work Experience
25
26### Meta || June 2022 - Present
27
28_Senior Software Engineer, Infrastructure Platform Team_ || San Francisco, CA
29
30- Architected distributed microservices orchestration platform with Kubernetes and Docker
31- Reduced deployment latency by 60% across 50+ services
32- Led cloud-native migration on Google Cloud, improving scalability 300% and saving $2M annually
33
34### PwC || July 2021 - May 2022
35
36- Built full-stack features for social platform (2B+ users) using React, Express.js, MongoDB
37- Impacted 50M+ monthly active users
38- Designed high-performance APIs with Node.js handling 1M+ QPS at 99.99% uptime
39
40## Projects
41
42### CloudTask: Distributed Task Management System _(Team of 4)_
43
44- Built scalable task orchestration with React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis
45- Implemented job scheduling with exactly-once processing semantics
46- [Live Demo](https://cloudtask.example.com) | [GitHub](https://github.com/adriansterling/cloudtask) | [Demo Video](https://youtu.be/example123)
47
48### AI Code Assistant _(Individual)_
49
50- Implemented advanced AST analysis with 92% accuracy rate
51- Published to Marketplace: 1,000+ installations, 4.8/5 rating, top trending 3 weeks
52- [Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=adriansterling.ai-assistant) | [GitHub](https://github.com/adriansterling/ai-code-assistant)
53
54### Advanced Weather Intelligence Platform _(Individual)_
55
56- Responsive design built with React and Tailwind CSS
57- Implemented geolocation services with predictive analytics and Chart.js visualizations
58- [Live Demo](https://weather.adriansterling.dev) | [GitHub](https://github.com/adriansterling/weather-dashboard)
59
60## Competitions, Honors and Awards
61
62### Winner — National Collegiate Hackathon || Nov 2021
63
64- Led team to build cross-platform React Native app with Firebase backend in 48-hour sprint
65- Application adopted by 500+ users and featured in TechCrunch
66
67### Finalist — Google Code Jam || Aug 2020
68
69- Top 500 globally out of 30,000+ competitive programmers in algorithmic competition
70- Solved complex NP-complete problems under time constraints
71
72## Technical Skills
73
74Languages
75: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, SQL, GraphQL, HTML/CSS
76
77Frameworks
78: React, Vue.js, Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Flask, Spring Boot, Next.js
79
80Databases
81: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB
82
83Cloud & DevOps
84: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, ECS), Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
85
86Tools & Other
87: Git, Linux, Nginx, WebSocket, REST APIs, Microservices, Jest, Cypress
88

27### Meta || June 2022 - Present
28
